module.name: fracbar
module.description: Visual fractions: segmented bars or pie discs showing n/d filled — one fraction per section, "3/4 label". For teaching fractions, shares, proportions.
module.aiSpec:
VISUAL FRACTIONS — each fraction drawn as a segmented bar (or a pie disc) with the numerator portion filled. Good for teaching fractions or comparing simple proportions side by side.
Body: split the sections with `<!-- @ -->`, one fraction per section written `n/d label` (label optional), e.g. `3/4 remaining`. n and d are whole numbers; if n > d it is clamped to d.
When NOT to use: for percentages/values as a chart use @barchart or @chartjs; this is a teaching aid for exact fractions.
Parameters: - `style` : bar | pie — segmented rectangle or disc. Default bar. - `color` : fill color of the numerator portion. Default var(--accent-color). - `showpercent` : true/false — also print the fraction as a rounded percent. Default false. - `size` : small | normal | large — size of the bars/discs. Default normal. - `align` : left | center | right — horizontal placement of the row. Default left.
<!-- @fracbar style: pie, showpercent: true --> 3/4 done <!-- @ --> 1/3 left <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Fill color
param.desc: Fill color of the numerator portion.

param.name: showpercent
param.label: Show percent
param.desc: Also print the fraction as a rounded percent.

param.name: size
param.label: Size
param.desc: Size of the bars or discs.

param.name: align
param.label: Alignment
param.desc: Horizontal placement of the row of fractions.

snippet.label: Fraction bars
snippet.description: Fractions "n/d label" drawn as segmented bars (or pies).
